summary: Comprehensive testing of the new PAYMENTS framework (Settings method switch, per-shop deposit, booking payment computation, PaymentPanel UI, admin mark paid/unpaid, CSV export, and PayPal card graceful failure). 14/14 backend pytest tests pass. Full end-to-end UI flow verified via Playwright: settings save, deposit save, booking creation, public PaymentPanel (paypalme-link + pay-in-person-btn), admin modal mark-paid/mark-unpaid toggle. State restored to defaults at end (method=off, all shop deposits=0).
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.jsx: two 'Save' buttons (save-settings and save-payment-settings) both invoke the same save() with the whole state — behaviour is correct but potentially confusing; consider labelling clearly (works today).

PaymentPanel 'Pay with PayPal' link uses target=_blank; there's no client-side callback so payment_status stays 'pending' until admin marks paid — expected for paypal_me flow, but a small helper on the confirmation page (e.g. 'I've paid — notify boutique') could be useful. Not a bug.

Customise page: after PATCH via API, navigating client-side to /admin/customise initially shows 0 in the deposit input due to initial useState default (0) rendering before load() completes; harmless flicker, but could be masked with a loading state.
seed_data_creation: Several TEST_ prefixed bookings were created during testing on the first available public slots (not cleaned to preserve booking IDs; low volume, safe).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend payment_method is left as 'off' and all shop deposit_amount=0 (live-default state). paypal_me_url may still be 'https://paypal.me/testshop' (harmless while method=off). PayPal card checkout endpoint (/paypal/create-order) correctly returns 400 'PayPal is not configured' — EXPECTED, not a bug. Reusable pytest file: /app/backend/tests/test_payments.py (14 tests, all passing).

verified_behaviours.GET /api/payments/config: Returns method, paypal_me_url, currency, paypal_client_id, paypal_configured. Verified.
verified_behaviours.Settings method switch: off / in_person / paypal_me / paypal all persist via PUT /api/settings; paypalme-url field appears conditionally.
verified_behaviours.Per-shop deposit: PATCH /api/shops/{id} with deposit_amount + deposit_required persists and returns in GET /api/shops.
verified_behaviours.Booking payment computation: method=off OR deposit<=0 -> not_required; in_person + deposit>0 -> pay_in_person; paypal_me + deposit>0 -> pending. All three verified with real bookings.
verified_behaviours.PaymentPanel UI: payment-amount shows £20.00, paypalme-link href = https://paypal.me/testshop/20.00GBP, pay-in-person-btn shown when deposit not required.
verified_behaviours.POST /paypal/create-order (unconfigured): Returns 400 'PayPal is not configured' as expected.
verified_behaviours.Admin mark paid/unpaid: PATCH /api/bookings/{id} with payment_status=paid sets paid_at; mark-paid button hidden and mark-unpaid appears; toggling back to pending works.
verified_behaviours.CSV export: Header contains Deposit and Payment columns.
